name: Ora Banda Mining Ltd
analysis: It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.3950, stop A$0.9850, target A$1.5900 (0.48:1) — then trail it.
